author: Niche Gamer
text:
Xbox might introduce Buy Now, Pay Later options for games and console A new discovery hidden within Xbox’s website code suggests Microsoft may be preparing to offer Buy Now, Pay Later options directly through its storefront. According to dataminers, references to services such as Klarna and PayPal Pay in 4 have appeared in the backend of the Xbox website. If implemented, you could potentially split purchases into […]

author: Niche Gamer
text:
SPRAWL Zero Preview I believe it was Franz Kafka and Junji Ito who most effectively illustrated the concept of “trap designed specifically for you”. A process, labyrinth or a hole. Anything can suck a man in and not let go. SPRAWL Zero is a honeypot made for yours truly. Inspired by shooters and aesthetics of the early 2000’s, […]

Xbox Game Pass lineup for late June 2026 announced Microsoft has announced the next lineup of games coming to Xbox Game Pass, free games for subscribers of the platform for late June 2026. author: Niche Gamer
text:
Edge of Memories Preview Edge of Memories was one of the games I was looking forward to during Steam Next Fest. The trailers, screenshots, and overall marketing suggested a visually impressive action RPG with an interesting world and a unique premise. Unfortunately, after spending several hours with the demo, I came away disappointed. The game shown in the promotional […]

author: Niche Gamer
text:
Clive Barker’s Hellraiser: Revival gets release date and twisted new trailer Saber Interactive and Boss Team Games announced a release date for Clive Barker’s Hellraiser: Revival. Clive Barker’s Hellraiser: Revival is set to launch across Windows PC (via Steam), PlayStation 5, and Xbox Series X/S on October 8th, just in time for Halloween. Here’s a rundown on the previously announced game, plus a new trailer: Embark on a battle for […]

author: Niche Gamer
text:
Study Measures Heart Rate Across 16 Games to Find the Most Stressful — Dark Souls Almost Wins, but Mario Kart Takes It You already know games can spike your heart rate. What you probably have not seen is the actual data. A study monitored the heart rates of 14 gamers across 30-minute sessions with 16 popular titles, tracking readings every ten seconds and averaging the results across the group. The goal was a clean, physiological ranking of […]

Nintendo Switch 1 and 2 system update 22.5.0 out now Nintendo has released the Nintendo Switch and Switch 2 system update 22.5.0, adding more language options and a new eShop layout for Switch 1. author: Niche Gamer
text:
Xbox reportedly looking to spin off several studios to avoid closures New reports are making the rounds that Xbox is in active discussions to spin off several internal game studios to avoid shutting them down outright. The new reports (Bloomberg, Verge) cite people familiar with Xbox’s plans, noting the publisher is looking to spin off Ninja Theory, Double Fine Productions, and Compulsion Games to avoid shutting […]

author: Niche Gamer
text:
Treyarch boss Mark Gordon resigns after 22 years Treyarch has announced studio head Mark Gordon is resigning after 22 years at the company to “focus on his next chapter.” While Gordon had his start in the industry back in 1996, he joined Treyarch in 2005 as their Chief Technology Officer and oversaw numerous projects including not-Call of Duty games. He later became head […]
